subject: [PATCH v5 01/18] fs/proc/task_mmu: fix make_uffd_wp_huge_pte() prot-update race

2026-05-26.patch_summary: This patch fixes a race condition in the make_uffd_wp_huge_pte() function, which is responsible for setting the UFFD_WP bit on present HugeTLB PTEs. The issue arises when the kernel-owned snapshot of the PTE is not updated atomically with the hardware update, leading to stale data being written back over the live hardware bits. To fix this, the patch mirrors the pattern used in the non-hugetlb sibling make_uffd_wp_pte() function by using ptep_modify_prot_start() and ptep_modify_prot_commit(). This ensures that the PTE is updated atomically, preventing the race condition and ensuring data consistency.
